short: A top-tier model in xAI's Grok line with real-time data access and room for long inputs.
definition: Grok 4 is a top-tier model in xAI's Grok line, built to give responsive, up-to-date answers by drawing on real-time data from the X platform and web search. It can take in a large amount of text at once and reason through multi-step problems, and is offered through xAI's platforms and API as well as business integrations on major cloud providers.
